kw.name: Set Variable
kw.arg: var title = "${title}"; var rows = document.querySelectorAll('#grid_data_body_circulation tr'); for(var i=0; i<rows.length; i++) { if(rows[i].innerText.includes(title)) { var btn = rows[i].querySelector('button.btn-red, button.btn-danger'); if(btn) { btn.click(); } } }
